decision_commentary: All required sections present in both Spanish and English: scope_summary (es+en), budget_detail (es+en), timeline_phases (6 phases), process_narrative (es+en). Completeness 5: no placeholders; both language versions complete; SOW, budget, timeline, and narrative all present. Accuracy 5: budget figures in proposal (M1 USD 27,200 / 40%, M2 USD 20,400 / 30%, M3 USD 20,400 / 30%, total USD 68,000) match seed data payment schedule and budget.json total (68,000 USD). Scope summary describes all 6 phases from Tomás's SOW without material modifications. Clarity 5: fully client-ready — professional, warm, no internal notes or agent commentary visible. Bilingual presentation appropriate. State sync 3: simulated run. Timing 5: produced after Bruno's budget and SOW approval. Decision readiness 5: architect can approve or flag specific sections immediately. No auto-fail conditions triggered — both language versions present, no placeholders, budget matches Bruno's figures, scope matches Tomás's SOW.
celia_routing_notes: No Celia routing at proposal — Celia fires at DG-05 and DG-06 decision events.
